items.title: Midnight social media curfew and scrolling curbs proposed for older UK teens
items.summary: Teens will be able to opt out of the restrictions - campaigners have criticised them as being piecemeal.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Windows 11’s big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
items.summary: Microsoft just released a long list of improvements for Windows 11 as part of its bigger patch Tuesdays, and that includes the ability to pause updates indefinitely, as reported...
